top_signals.title: Iran reportedly launches missiles as Trump mulls deal to pause war for two months
top_signals.summary: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: HM Treasury: 2026 COVID-19 Cost Tracker update
top_signals.summary: Official Statistics on the cost of measures announced in response to the COVID-19 pandemic and how much the government has spent on these measures so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Former LVMH Chair Brown Discusses K-Shaped Recovery Within Luxury Sector
top_signals.summary: Pauline Brown, former chair of LVMH North America, joined the discussion to analyze the ongoing k-shaped economic recovery, particularly within the luxury retail sector. She highlighted that even among luxury brands, performance is diverging significantly. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tech Mahindra president: UK needs less hesitation, more conviction
top_signals.summary: Tech Mahindra president Harshul Asnani, who returned to London after almost 20 years in Silicon Valley, takes us through his career.
